name: Bloodbath Blade
description: Notes A katana focused on damage, with additional armor piercing on its extra projectiles. The bonus attack is anywhere from +2 to +20, scaling linearly once the player reaches 95% HP, and increasing in increments of +2 with each additional 10% HP lost with the max of +20 attack given at 5% HP.
effects: On Shoot: Sick on self when in combat, Gain an ATK Boost the lower your HP is.
Shots hit multiple targets Shots boomerang
Shots hit multiple targets Ignores defense of target
